name: Grilled Cajun Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp. dry jerk seasoning (Caribbean or Jamaican)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Cajun coating mix by combining the ingredients in the order listed above.
2. Mix well in a bowl.
3. Preheat grill.
4. Dip shrimp into the Cajun mix to coat evenly.
5. Place on hot grill and blacken each side (5-8 minutes = total grilling time).
6. Enjoy hot or cold with lemon. (Served 4 - depending upon course)
